# expert-agent-mcp-server Test-Pack Reference

## Registry Source

Central registry: `cloud-dog-ai-platform-standards/test-packs/REGISTRY.tsv`.
Per PS-TEST-PACKS-REGISTRY Â§6 expert-agent-mcp-server consumes `TP-AJOBS`,
`TP-COMMON` and `TP-INTEGRATION-EXAMPLES`. There is **no expert-agent-specific
zip** in the Test-Design-Audit-Jun26 dump; the service-specific pack column is
`N/A` (registry has no `owner_service=expert-agent-mcp-server` row â€” source
evidence: `test-packs/REGISTRY.tsv`).

## No-Copy Policy

This service references central packs; unpacked dump contents are not copied into
this repository. Generated fixture data created by Stream-B tests is local test
output and is removed or regenerated by the test harness.

## Fixture Materialization Policy

| generated_path | pack_id | command_or_fixture | cleanup | tests |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `working/test-fixtures/ajobs/` | `TP-AJOBS` | Stream-B fixture (job lifecycle seed) | removed at session teardown | AJOBS IT/AT |
| `working/test-fixtures/common/` | `TP-COMMON` | Stream-B fixture (auth/RBAC seed) | removed at session teardown | QT/IT negative |
